description:
Ketubba, with an ornate decorated frame with peacocks and lions or tigers. Location: Bombay. Dated: Monday, 25 Adar 5626 AM = 12 March 1866 CE. Groom: Sulaymān Ḥayyim b. Eliyyahu Ḥayyim. Bride: Esther bt. Yosef Yeḥezqel Sassoon. Signed by Meʾir Sulaymān [...]. 

JRL SERIES A 960 (PGPID 28375) is the bill of divorce (geṭ) for the same couple.
